notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Francisco Lindor.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Marcus Semien. Nico Hoerner to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Matt Shaw out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Marcus Semien. Alex Bregman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Nico Hoerner out at 2nd. Carson Kelly out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly rally-killer GIDP
